arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Reaction Show: Report says Bayern Munich has decided to cut ties with Thomas Müller
arts.sum: One thing is for sure — there is a lot to talk about and discuss regarding the career achievements of a player like Müller and why it has all come to this. Is it just the natural course of a career even for a club legend like Müller — or could something have been done to make it a more palatable exit for fans and the player alike?

arts.ttl: FC Augsburg vs. Bayern Munich: Live stream, game time thread, odds, prediction, how to watch
arts.sum: Augsburg is on a 11-game undefeated streak in the Bundesliga, only allowing three goals during the impressive stretch. Bayern needs five wins out the final seven matches to reclaim the Bundesliga title but will have to manage the feat without a number of high profile players.

arts.ttl: Throwback: The last time Augsburg beat Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Let's look back at how Augsburg lined up in their last victory over der Rekordmeister in 2022/23!

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Bayern Munich wants to add another left-back...but who?; The end of an era at Bayern — Thomas Müller is reportedly out; Bundesliga predictions; Throwing it back to Letters to Cleo; and MORE!
arts.sum: Raphaël Guerreiro: The former Borussia Dortmund man will turn 32 during the 2025/26 campaign and has had a solid season overall, but has not exactly excelled while playing a left-back because of his defensive struggles. According to a report from kicker journalist Georg Holzner (via @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich is going to be in the market for a left-back this summer, which seems...odd...considering how many players on the current roster can play the position.

arts.ttl: Hasan Salihamidžić speaks on his time as board member at Bayern Munich: “It isn’t always the easiest or most pleasant job, but it’s what I wanted”
arts.sum: And with this return comes a chance to speak about his ~5 years as board member for sport at Bayern and the controversial manner in which he was sacked. No matter what decision was ultimately made, I will always love FC Bayern and be proud of what I achieved with the club as a player and what we, my team and I, achieved during my time as sporting director and board member.

arts.ttl: Breaking: It’s over! Report says Wednesday meeting finalized decision for Bayern Munich to let go of Thomas Müller
arts.sum: According to a report from Bild (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), the Thomas Müller Era will end at Bayern Munich this summer. There are still some points to be discussed, such as Müller’s potential participation at the Club World Cup, as his contract expires on June 30, and whether he will be given a farewell at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich captain Helmer on Uli Hoeneß succession search: “As long as Uli is there, it’s clear who makes the decisions”
arts.sum: Though the legendary former president Uli Hoeneß stepped down from his official role of the club years ago, he retains a spot on the supervisory board. But when will the day be that the 73-year-old Hoeneß will decide to step back completely?

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — April 4th, 2025: What’s your prediction for FC Augsburg vs. Bayern Munich in the Bundesliga?
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. Great, then check out the Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show:

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich to dress Lennart Karl and Jonah Kusi-Asare vs. FC Augsburg
arts.sum: Attacking midfielder/winger Lennart Karl and striker Jonah Kusi-Asare will be a part of the squad for head coach Vincent Kompany: Lennart Karl will be in the Bundesliga squad against Augsburg for the first time today.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich hold initial talks with Marseille winger Luis Henrique
arts.sum: Bild reports that Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany’s recent trip to France had meaning behind it; he was there to watch Marseille winger Luis Henrique. Bayern are said to have…
